name: Coconut Bon Bons <Almond Joy>
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small pan, heat the corn syrup until very hot but do not burn it.
2. Thoroughly coat the coconut with the corn syrup using a spoon or spatula.
3. Cover with wax paper and set aside for an hour so that the coconut becomes well saturated with the corn syrup.
4. Use your hands to roll into balls. These are excellent as bonbon fillings or can be used in almond candy molds or candy bar molds.
5. For Valentine's Day, dip white or pink, then drizzle on red coating.
6. Optionally, finely chopped nuts and/or almonds or cherries may be added for variety.
